review_text: Great caravan park located near Townsville beautifully clean amenities communal kitchen
Amazing place so helpful go above and beyond.

Beautiful maintained caravan park with big spacious sites. Never seen a cleaner, more inviting camp kitchen and modern, spotless bathrooms. Wish we had more time to spend there. We stopped on our way down south from Cairns to avoid staying in Townsville. Recommend!
Loved my time there
Lovely lady ,
Very pleasant place to stay with loads of room, friendly people. Activities to join in. Thoroughly recommend this park for over 50s

Great caravan park and has the best camp kitchen I have ever seen with a full size pizza oven as well. Lyn the office lady is the best! Nothing is too much trouble for her. She found us a spot even though they were very full. The price is the same all year round, $38 powered and $35 unpowered. Will definitely be back!
Excellent location and service

Clean, had everything you could need and they even checked to see if we needed to borrow leads or hoses. Activities that you can take part in if you choose. We were included in a free burger night. Would definitely stay again
Great park. Safe and secure.  Pin number access.  With both a clean and well equiped camp kitchen. Well stay here again.

Would put less if possible. The shower pressure is terrible and they will not fix, had many associated campers complain. They are rude and arrogant .  They tell campers what they can and cannot do. They tell them not to go to the local food places, and will not allow them access to the river on the back door step. They spy’s and use drones at neighboring properties. They make the neighbors feels uneasy by constantly spying and bullying of surrounding neighbours. Would not recommend. Be careful on being forced to sign a contract after turning up for more than two weeks. They make you sign a 12 month lease regardless of your wanted length of stay.

Nice out of the way, place to stay near Townsville. The owner was kind enough to come down and check us in after hours.  Clean toilet and shower facilities. We only stayed for 1 night using a powered site. Very reasonably priced.
Just visiting

Reasonably good value park.
Needs a good spruce up. Ammenties were poor. Some watering wouldn't hurt.
Great value sites with plenty of room to spread out. Staff were very helpful

What a hidden gem this is.  Staff are so friendly courteous fun filled happy hour and activities during the season.  Highly recommend  stay over here, quiet, level large sites and very clean facilities!
Great park. Toilets amazing. But dog control leaves abit to be desired. Not everyone are comfortable around dogs. They do have a dog of leash area needs to be policed
Great park, quite and spacious
A quiet place at night, good parking and activities in the kitchen at night. Cheap enough.

Safest park in Townsville, nothing is a problem for the staff. They are very friendly and accommodating. The camp kitchen is a must to see along with Happy Hour, especially Tuesdays and Fridays. The sunsets are spectacular. There are lots of birds and wallabies around. Very quite and peaceful. A great place to relax. Large showers and plenty of hot water. Lots of room for large buses and 5th wheelers. Drive through sites. Pet friendly, they have a large off leash area for your pet to run.
We arrived late to stay the night very accommodating. Facilities very clean and beautiful hot showers great place to stay
Great park to stop in we only stayed 3 nights had all the right stuff clean amenities & they even put on events throughout the week you can join in on
Happy hour everyday great conversations staff great. Amenities always clean. The grounds are kept in order. The place too stay.
Great caravan park, clean amenities; super quiet. Just quite a way out of town around 30kms.

Fabulous park to stay in. Spacious sites, spacious showers that are hot and great pressure. Not far from town. Safe. Games nights, happy hours. Do as little or as much as you like. Lovely owners, lovely park crew. We thoroughly enjoyed our 15 night stay. Thank you
Happy hour a bonus  big sites friendly staff  and fellow travellers
Great place to stay for over 50's. Would recommend this caravan park and will definitely be back again. The staff were so nice and friendly.

Great place to rest.  Super friendly staff. Fabulous camp kitchen,  even has a pizza oven if you want to make your own. Clean amenities.  Short drive to Townsville. Very quiet and even has a special place for dogs to get some exercise.
Highly recommend.

Nice quiet caravan park for over 50's about 30 mins away from Townsville. Great dog off leash area for your pets to run around in . Amenities are good nice and clean.  Staff are friendly and wave when they see you .
Great place for $30 a night.
Lovely van Park.  No rooms only caravan sites. Good amenities.

An over 50s park so very quiet. Not pushy with their happy hour like other places, which suits us. 4. 30 bell if you want to attend. Sites are a bit tight width wise but good size and enables you to stay hooked up. Quiet location. Sites all grass. Amenities old but always clean. Large well equiped camp kitchen and large book swap. Laundry also. Plenty of bins. No fires. Big rig sites available. Staff friendly. Locked gate with keypad entry.

Packed in tight in busy season, some of us couldn't put out our awnings, but great managers, social afternoon get togethers, safe and secure outside of TSV crime central. Would stay again when it's a little quieter or request a wider site.
Caravan Park for over 50s great no kids and pets are welcome
Bad customer service when park cannot be bothered to answer 2 emails re availability
